name: glob
label: glob
description: Find files using ripgrep file discovery: rg --files -g '<pattern>' <path>.
promptGuidelines: Use glob for fast file discovery.

pattern.description: Glob pattern used to match files.

path.description: Directory to search in. If omitted, the current working directory is used.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. If omitted, the default limit is {{defaultLimit}}.

noIgnore.description: Include files ignored by .gitignore, .ignore, or other ripgrep ignore rules. If true, passes `--no-ignore`. If omitted, defaults to false.

hidden.description: Include hidden files. If true, passes `--hidden`. If omitted, defaults to false.
